title: acilepis ngaoensis
intro: Acilepis ngaoensis, also known as the Ngaoensis plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The Ngaoensis plant has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Acilepis ngaoensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional New Zealand medicine.
